#  Resend an Invitation to a User in Your Free Procore Account (iOS) 
##### Limited Release
The Team tool is currently only available to users in the United States who have a free Procore account via the [Procore Construction Network](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network).
##  Things to Consider 
  * To have a free Procore account, become a part of the [Procore Construction Network ](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-procore-construction-network)(PCN).
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'System Administrator' permissions on the Procore Construction Network account.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Team** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.  
_Note:_ Find the 'Team' tool on any of your app's main pages: Sidebar screen, Home screen, or Project Overview screen.
  2. Click the name of the user that you want to resend an invitation to.
  3. Click **Resend Invite** to automatically resend the email invitation.


## See Also
  * [View Users in Your Free Procore Account (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-ios/tutorials/view-users-in-your-free-procore-account-ios)
  * [Search for and Filter Users in Your Free Procore Account (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-ios/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-users-in-your-free-procore-account-ios)
  * [Edit a User in Your Free Procore Account (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/team-ios/tutorials/edit-a-user-in-your-free-procore-account-ios)
title: Resend an Invitation to a User in Your Free Procore Account (iOS)
description: How to resend an invitation to a user in the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
